sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Donnelley Financial Solutions' (NYSE:DFIN) Five-year Total Shareholder Returns Outpace the Underlying Earnings Growth
feed.summary: Donnelley Financial Solutions (NYSE:DFIN) has demonstrated a five-year total shareholder return of 97%, which has outpaced its underlying earnings per share growth of 20% annually over the same period. Despite a recent 33% decline in share price over the past year and a 14% drop in the last month, the long-term performance remains strong. This discrepancy suggests that the market's enthusiasm for the stock may have waned recently, despite solid fundamental growth.

feed.title: PTC FlexPLM to Strengthen SPG Company's Licensed Product Operations
feed.summary: PTC announced that SPG Company, a global leader in licensed product design and manufacturing, has selected PTC's FlexPLM retail product lifecycle management solution. This move will modernize SPG's end-to-end product lifecycle operations by replacing its legacy system with a scalable, cloud-based platform. The goal is to address performance and data consistency issues, enabling faster development cycles and enhancing collaboration.

feed.title: Ameren Missouri is building a stronger grid and delivering reliability for customers
feed.summary: Ameren Missouri has filed its updated Smart Energy Plan, detailing investments made to strengthen its electric grid and enhance customer reliability. In 2025, upgrades prevented 160,000 outages during major storms, with projects focusing on modernizing infrastructure, improving storm hardening, and upgrading substations. The plan also includes investments in a diverse energy portfolio and is designed to drive economic growth in Missouri.

feed.title: A smart move for beauty-from-within: Make Time Wellness expands to Ulta Beauty
feed.summary: Make Time Wellness has expanded its brain health product line to Ulta Beauty's website, signaling a growing trend where beauty retailers are broadening their wellness offerings beyond traditional topical solutions. The brand emphasizes a "brain first" approach to beauty-from-within, focusing on cognitive support before addressing physical and aesthetic outcomes. This move highlights increasing retailer expectations for scientifically-backed, multi-benefit formulations in the beauty-from-within category.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: West Pharmaceutical Services Q4 2025 earnings beat expectations
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, exceeding revenue and EPS expectations. The company posted an EPS of $2.04 against a forecast of $1.84, and revenue of $805 million compared to an anticipated $796.25 million, leading to a 4.07% rise in pre-market stock price. Key drivers include high-value product components, expansion in the GLP-1 market, and upgrades related to Annex 1 regulations.

feed.title: After a 15% Drop in 2025, Can ONEOK Stock Recover in 2026?
feed.summary: ONEOK (ONEOK) enters 2026 with governance changes, including new independent directors, and a dividend increase, aiming to solidify oversight and cash flow stability. Despite a 15% drop in 2025, a TIKR valuation model projects ONEOK stock could reach $100 by December 2027, implying an 18% upside and a 9.3% annualized return over two years. However, this return is considered conservative and slightly below typical equity hurdle rates, indicating potential risks related to integration and commodity exposure.

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts Price Target on Assurant to $246 From $255, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: BMO Capital has revised its price target for Assurant (AIZ) down to $246 from $255, while upholding its Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after Assurant's Q4 2025 earnings call. The company is involved in insurance-credit and specialty property insurance sectors.

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts Price Target on Globe Life to $146 From $145, Maintains Market Perform Rating
feed.summary: BMO Capital has adjusted its price target for Globe Life Inc. (GL) to $146, up from $145, while retaining a Market Perform rating. This update reflects the analyst's re-evaluation of the company's financial outlook. Globe Life operates in life and health insurance sectors, and this news follows recent insider share sales and other analyst target adjustments.

feed.title: Are Wall Street Analysts Predicting Pentair Stock Will Climb or Sink?
feed.summary: Pentair plc (PNR) has underperformed the broader market and the Invesco Global Water ETF over the past year. Despite a recent dip following Q4 2025 earnings, the company reported increased sales and adjusted EPS, with analysts expecting continued EPS improvement in FY2026. The consensus analyst rating is a "Moderate Buy," with a mean price target suggesting a 14.9% upside.

feed.title: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) Faces Pressure as Revenue Falls Short and CEO Change Looms
feed.summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) is experiencing significant pressure after its fourth-quarter revenue and profit fell short of analyst projections, leading to a substantial intraday stock decline. Alex Chriss will be replaced as CEO by Enrique Lores of HP Inc. due to the company's poor performance and failure to meet turnaround goals. The company also saw a decrease in growth for PayPal-branded online checkouts, attributed to global economic headwinds and reduced US retail spending.

feed.title: Machine-Vision Stock Soars 24%. Manufacturing Is Improving.
feed.summary: Shares of machine vision provider Cognex (CGNX) surged by 24% after reporting strong quarterly results. This performance indicates a positive trend in the industrial sector and marks another success for a manufacturing company.

feed.title: BASF Strengthens Business Services Through Global Hub Setup
feed.summary: BASF is establishing a new centralized hub in India to enhance its Global Business Services, focusing on cost efficiency, operational resilience, and consistent support. This strategy involves consolidating Finance and HR functions in India, optimizing supply chain in Kuala Lumpur, and maintaining regional management for proximity-dependent services. The new hub model aims to simplify processes, increase automation, and leverage competitive costs to support BASF's long-term objectives.

feed.title: New Study Finds Paycom’s IWant Has Delivered Significant ROI
feed.summary: A new study commissioned by Paycom and conducted by Forrester Consulting has revealed that Paycom's IWant™ AI engine delivers significant return on investment. The study projected a three-year ROI of up to 431% for a composite organization, highlighting substantial savings in manager and employee hours. This demonstrates IWant's impact on streamlining workflows, enhancing decision-making, and improving overall organizational efficiency across various levels.

feed.title: Should You Expect Accelerated Growth for Eaton Corporation plc (ETN) in 2026?
feed.summary: Carillon Tower Advisers, through its Carillon Eagle Growth & Income Fund, released its Q4 2025 investor letter, highlighting Eaton Corporation plc (ETN). Despite a slight pullback in August 2025, the fund anticipates accelerated growth for Eaton in 2026, driven by strong trends in data center, aerospace, and defense markets. Eaton Corporation plc closed at $396.09 per share on February 11, 2026, with a market capitalization of $154.198 billion.

feed.title: Stryker says DOJ, SEC have closed bribery probes
feed.summary: Stryker announced that the U.S. Justice Dept. and Securities and Exchange Commission have concluded their probes into potential anti-bribery law violations, which began in May 2023. The investigations focused on business activities in an undisclosed foreign country to determine if Stryker violated the Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA). Although the company has had previous FCPA violations, Stryker stated that ongoing inquiries by certain foreign authorities are not expected to materially affect its financial statements.

feed.title: Electric and gas utility Fortis reports $422M Q4 profit, up from $396M a year earlier
feed.summary: Fortis Inc., a major electric and gas utility, reported a fourth-quarter profit of $422 million, an increase from $396 million in the same period last year. This growth indicates a strong financial performance for the company.

feed.title: Emergent BioSolutions to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results on February 26, 2026
feed.summary: Emergent BioSolutions Inc. will hold a conference call on Thursday, February 26, 2026, at 5:00 pm eastern time to discuss its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. Participants can access the call via webcast on the Investors page of Emergent’s website or by registering in advance for telephone participation. Emergent BioSolutions focuses on protecting public health by delivering life-saving solutions for various health threats.

feed.title: FedEx (FDX) Reveals Ambitious Financial Targets for 2029 at Inve
feed.summary: FedEx (FDX) has unveiled ambitious financial targets for 2029, aiming for $98 billion in revenue and $8 billion in operating income, driven by a focus on high-margin sectors and digital enhancements. The company plans to achieve an 8% operating margin and an 11% return on invested capital, with strategic initiatives expected to boost operating income by $3 billion. Despite strong financial health indicators, investors are advised to be mindful of its current valuation, which, based on P/E, P/S, and P/B ratios, suggests the stock might be overvalued.

feed.title: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) Faces Pressure as Revenue Falls Short and CEO Change Looms
feed.summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) experienced a significant stock drop, up to 19%, after announcing that Enrique Lores would replace Alex Chriss as CEO following a miss on fourth-quarter revenue and profit expectations. The company reported $8.68 billion in revenue and $1.23 earnings per share for Q4, with growth in PayPal-branded online checkouts slowing to 1%. This leadership change and financial underperformance come amidst global economic headwinds and decreased U.S. retail spending.

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts KKR & Co Price Target to $125 From $155, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: BMO Capital has adjusted its price target for KKR & Co. (KKR) to $125, down from the previous $155, while reiterating an "Outperform" rating on the investment firm's stock. This change reflects an updated valuation perspective from BMO Capital on KKR, which operates in insurance and asset management. The article also lists other recent analyst adjustments and financial news related to KKR.

feed.title: Barclays upgrades Analog Devices as industrial recovery takes shape
feed.summary: Barclays upgraded Analog Devices (ADI) to Overweight, citing the company's strong position to benefit from an improving industrial sector and its "cleanest operating model and balance sheet." Analyst Tom O’Malley noted that while broader industrial recovery is emerging, ADI's high leverage to industrial exposure makes it the most attractive stock in the space. The bank initiated coverage on Microchip and ON Semiconductor at Equal Weight, highlighting specific challenges for each despite some growth opportunities.

feed.title: Wallace Weitz Exits CarMax Inc, Impacting Portfolio by -1.58%
feed.summary: Wallace Weitz submitted his 13F filing for Q4 2025, revealing significant changes to his portfolio. He completely exited four holdings, most notably CarMax Inc (KMX), and reduced stakes in 17 others, including Charter Communications Inc (CHTR) and Alphabet Inc (GOOG). Conversely, he added Euronet Worldwide Inc (EEFT) and increased positions in 12 stocks, with the largest increase in Liberty Broadband Corp (LBRDK).

feed.title: SLB lines up offshore drilling work on Asian deepwater gas project
feed.summary: SLB has secured multiple contracts with UAE-based Mubadala Energy for offshore drilling services at the Tangkulo natural gas deepwater development in the Andaman Sea, offshore Indonesia. The agreements cover integrated drilling and well services across the full well life cycle, utilizing advanced technologies to enhance safety, reliability, and operational performance. First gas from the project, which holds over 2 trillion cubic feet of gas-in-place, is targeted before the end of 2028.

feed.title: CSX President and Chief Executive Officer to Address Barclays Industrial Select Conference
feed.summary: CSX Corporation announced that its President and Chief Executive Officer, Steve Angel, will speak at the Barclays 43rd Annual Industrial Select Conference on February 19. The event will be broadcast live via webcast and a replay will be available afterward. Further financial information is available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Aurasell launches AI-native Go-To-Market Operating System for Salesforce and HubSpot
feed.summary: Aurasell Inc. has launched its AI-native Go-To-Market (GTM) Operating System, designed to automate and enhance workflows for Salesforce, HubSpot, and other CRM environments without requiring their replacement. The GTM OS aims to improve team productivity by eliminating manual work and consolidating tools, leveraging AI-driven execution and a unified context layer. Aurasell, a venture capital-backed startup, plans to introduce additional features, including a custom agent builder and agentic enterprise search, later this month.

feed.title: Who shapes global markets? CME Group’s 2026 board picks
feed.summary: CME Group announced its slate of 19 director nominees for election at the annual meeting on May 14, 2026. The nominees include 14 directors for election by Class A and Class B shareholders combined, and five class-specific nominees for Class B subclasses. This announcement follows a period of positive operational and financial milestones for CME Group, including record 2025 revenue and strong volume growth.

feed.title: BofA Community Development Banking Delivers $7.4 Billion in Financing, Creating 11,000+ Affordable Housing Units in 2025
feed.summary: Bank of America's Community Development Banking provided $7.4 billion in debt and equity financing in 2025, leading to the creation of over 11,000 affordable housing units across 87 developments in 68 cities. Since 2020, the program has delivered a total of $42 billion, supporting over 74,000 housing units. These initiatives include investments in workforce and middle-income housing, as well as developments with integrated healthcare components, addressing diverse housing needs.

feed.title: EUROPEAN COMMISSION APPROVES AMGEN'S UPLIZNA® FOR GENERALIZED MYASTHENIA GRAVIS
feed.summary: The European Commission has approved Amgen's UPLIZNA® (inebilizumab) as an add-on treatment for adults with generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG) who are anti-acetylcholine receptor (AChR) or anti-muscle specific tyrosine kinase (MuSK) antibody positive. This approval offers a new targeted treatment option with twice-yearly maintenance dosing, bringing a first-in-class approach for durable disease control. The decision is supported by data from the MINT study, which showed significant improvement in gMG symptoms and the potential to reduce long-term steroid use.

feed.title: Merck: Keytruda Remains Resilient Despite LOE Risks - Buy Upon Correction (NYSE:MRK)
feed.summary: Merck's Keytruda, supported by new indications and the upcoming 20-year monopoly of KEYTRUDA QLEX, is expected to maintain strong revenue despite patent expiry risks. The company also benefits from high single-digit growth in Animal Health/Livestock and triple-digit growth from Winrevair. With a healthy balance sheet, secure dividends, and a reasonable valuation, a pullback to $100-$110 or 50-DMA levels is suggested as an opportune buying point.

feed.title: Cyber risk firm Tenable tagged as Gartner's AI 'company to beat'
feed.summary: Tenable (NASDAQ: TENB) has been recognized by Gartner in its 2025 AI Vendor Race report as "the company to beat for AI-powered exposure assessment." Gartner highlighted Tenable's ability to combine vulnerability assessment, asset discovery, third-party telemetry, and AI to prioritize exposures and automate remediation. This acknowledgment reinforces Tenable's strategy of using AI to unify and contextualize risk exposure for proactive defense in cybersecurity.

feed.title: Alphabet: The CAPEX Shock Is A True Gift (NASDAQ:GOOG)
feed.summary: Alphabet (GOOG) is rated a "Buy" with a 46% upside to a $455 price target, despite recent stock weakness driven by increased capital expenditure. The company's Google Cloud revenue saw a 48% year-over-year surge in Q4, and its aggressive AI investments are expected to contribute significantly to profitability. Concerns regarding CAPEX and bond issuance are considered overblown, given GOOG's strong free cash flow, substantial liquidity, and robust demand for its debt.

feed.title: eBay Live Launches in Canada, Bringing Real-Time, Community-Driven Shopping Nationwide
feed.summary: eBay Canada has officially launched eBay Live, an interactive livestream shopping experience, expanding its reach to Canadian buyers. The launch coincides with major collectibles events in Vancouver and Toronto, and features special guests and auctions for rare trading cards like a Macklin Celebrini rookie auto and a Charizard Gold Star Holo Rare PSA 7. eBay Live offers a new way for enthusiasts to connect with sellers, discover inventory, and engage with the collecting community within a trusted marketplace.

feed.title: New DuPont membrane turns factory wastewater into reusable water
feed.summary: DuPont's FilmTec™ Fortilife™ XC160UHP reverse osmosis element has been named a finalist in the 2026 Edison Awards for its innovative ability to treat and reuse industrial wastewater. This technology boasts higher water recovery, reduced energy consumption, and lower operational costs for various heavy industries. The recognition further solidifies DuPont's position as a leader in water and sustainability solutions, following a series of successful product launches and positive earnings reports.

feed.title: Baron Durable Advantage Fund Bets on Danaher Corporation (DHR) During Cyclical Challenges
feed.summary: The Baron Durable Advantage Fund increased its position in Danaher Corporation (DHR) despite the company facing cyclical challenges in the life science tools sector, such as constrained biotechnology funding, reduced NIH funding, and pricing pressures in China. The fund sees long-term value in Danaher, a healthcare and life science tools company, focusing on its strong competitive advantages and consistent shareholder returns, while acknowledging current headwinds. Danaher's stock closed at $219.98 on February 11, 2026, with a market capitalization of $155.504 billion, and was held by 117 hedge funds at the end of Q3 2025.

feed.title: Analysts Cite Secular Trends For Lam Research Corporation (LRCX)'s Development
feed.summary: Argus Research raised its price target for Lam Research Corporation (LRCX) to $280 from $175 and maintained a Buy rating, citing strong Q2 results and the company's positioning for long-term growth due to secular trends like generative AI and cloud data centers. Additionally, LRCX and CEA-Leti announced a new multi-year agreement to advance next-generation Specialty Technology devices, focusing on innovative materials and fabrication techniques for AI and high-performance computing. Lam Research Corporation is a key player in semiconductor equipment, manufacturing integrated circuits and AI-era chips globally.

feed.title: Rosenblatt Maintains "Buy" Rating on Harmonic (HLIT) with $14 PT
feed.summary: Rosenblatt has reaffirmed its "Buy" rating for Harmonic (HLIT) with a steady price target of $14.00, indicating continued confidence in the company's performance. This follows other recent analyst updates, including Needham reiterating a "Buy" with a $15.00 price target and Barclays maintaining "Equal-Weight" but raising its price target to $11.00. The average target price from five analysts is $11.60, suggesting a potential upside of 15.88% from the current price.

feed.title: Fiserv Introduces INDX, a Real-Time Cash Settlement Platform for Digital Asset Companies
feed.summary: Fiserv has launched INDX, a real-time cash settlement platform designed for digital asset companies to securely store and transfer US dollars 24/7. This platform allows funds to be distributed across Fiserv's Deposit Network, offering up to $25 million in FDIC insurance by leveraging over 1,100 insured US banks, keeping cash off-chain while providing rapid settlement. INDX aims to provide a faster, more secure, scalable, and programmable solution for institutional traders, enhancing deposit funding solutions following Fiserv's acquisition of StoneCastle.

feed.title: Genasys (GNSS) Secures $2M Contract with Singapore Navy
feed.summary: Genasys Inc. (GNSS) has secured a $2 million contract from the Republic of Singapore Navy for its LRAD 950NXTs to be installed on unmanned surface vessels, potentially leading to future orders. Despite this win, the company faces financial challenges, including negative earnings, declining gross margins, and high debt, placing it in a financially distressed zone. Investors are advised to consider these risks and the company's valuation metrics carefully.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group announces proposed offering of senior unsecured notes
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has announced a registered public offering of senior unsecured notes. The company plans to use the proceeds primarily to refinance senior notes maturing in 2026 and to repay existing indebtedness, potentially including term loans. J.P. Morgan Securities LLC, Morgan Stanley & Co. LLC, and PNC Capital Markets LLC are managing the offering.

feed.title: RBC Raises Price Target on Smurfit Westrock to $57 From $51, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital has increased its price target for Smurfit Westrock (SW) to $57 from $51, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects positive analyst sentiment towards the packaging solutions company. Other financial institutions like BofA, Citigroup, BNP Paribas, and Wells Fargo also recently raised their price objectives for Smurfit Westrock.

feed.title: Analysts Cite Secular Trends For Lam Research Corporation (LRCX)’s Development
feed.summary: Argus Research has increased its price target for Lam Research Corporation (LRCX) to $280 from $175, maintaining a Buy rating, following strong Q2 results and growth in 2025. The firm believes LRCX is well-positioned for long-term development due to secular trends such as generative AI, cloud data centers, and IoT. Additionally, Lam Research Corporation announced a new multi-year agreement with CEA-Leti to advance next-generation Specialty Technology devices, focusing on innovative materials and fabrication techniques for AI and high-performance computing.

feed.title: Mubadala Hires SLB for Deepwater Drilling Services Offshore Indonesia
feed.summary: Mubadala Energy has awarded SLB multiple offshore drilling services contracts for the Tangkulo natural gas deepwater development in the Andaman Sea, offshore Indonesia. The contracts encompass integrated drilling and well services, leveraging SLB’s advanced technologies for efficient execution and risk reduction. First gas from the Tangkulo development is anticipated before the end of 2028, supporting Indonesia's energy security goals.

feed.title: Fifth Third Comerica Merger Reshapes Growth, Governance And Valuation Story
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp's merger with Comerica Inc. has created the ninth-largest U.S. bank, leading to expanded governance and new preferred stock. This transaction positions Fifth Third in a larger peer group with increased market span, focusing on integration execution, cost synergies, and revenue trends. Investors should monitor the company's valuation, which Simply Wall St assesses as significantly undervalued, alongside its P/E ratio and dividend yield.

feed.title: CME Group Inc. Declares First Quarter 2026 Quarterly Dividend, Payable March 26 , 2026
feed.summary: CME Group Inc. has announced its first-quarter regular dividend of $1.30 per share, an increase of 5 cents from the previous quarter's $1.25 per share. This dividend is payable on March 26, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of March 10, 2026, as declared by the company.

feed.title: CrowdStrike Named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ ‘Voice of the Customer’ for User Authentication Report
feed.summary: CrowdStrike has been recognized as a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ ‘Voice of the Customer’ for User Authentication report. The company received the most 5-star reviews and the highest product capability rating among all vendors, with a 96% Willingness to Recommend score. This recognition highlights CrowdStrike's Falcon Next-Gen Identity Security for its ability to secure all identities, including human, non-human, and AI agents, across the hybrid identity lifecycle, validating its approach to combating modern identity-based attacks.

feed.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Has $10.68 Million Holdings in Hershey Company (The) $HSY
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC increased its stake in The Hershey Company (HSY) by 14.6% in Q3, bringing its total holdings to 57,071 shares valued at $10.68 million. Despite institutional investors owning nearly 58% of the company and Hershey exceeding earnings expectations with an EPS of $1.71 and revenue of $3.09 billion, analysts currently maintain a "Hold" rating with an average target price of $218.21. The company also raised its quarterly dividend to $1.452, but its high payout ratio of 126.27% raises concerns about dividend sustainability.

feed.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Purchases 10,812 Shares of Church & Dwight Co., Inc. $CHD
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC increased its stake in Church & Dwight Co., Inc. by 10.8% during the third quarter, acquiring an additional 10,812 shares, bringing their total ownership to 111,097 shares valued at $9.735 million. This news comes as director Janet S. Vergis sold 12,960 shares, reducing her position by over 43%. Church & Dwight also reported strong Q3 earnings, beating EPS estimates, and raised its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Has $9.56 Million Stake in Prologis, Inc. $PLD
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC significantly increased its stake in Prologis, Inc. (NYSE:PLD) by 31.7% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 83,473 shares valued at approximately $9.56 million. Prologis reported strong quarterly earnings and revenue, exceeding estimates, and provided positive FY2026 guidance. Despite a high payout ratio, institutional investors hold a substantial portion of the company's stock, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $135.32.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts Fortinet PT to $78 From $80, Maintains In Line Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has adjusted its price target for Fortinet (FTNT) down to $78 from $80, while maintaining an "In Line" rating on the stock. This update comes amidst a series of other analyst adjustments for Fortinet, both upward and downward, following recent financial updates.

feed.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Cuts Position in Devon Energy Corporation $DVN
feed.summary: Wealthfront Advisers LLC has decreased its stake in Devon Energy Corporation ($DVN) by 9.8%, selling 27,386 shares and retaining 251,886 shares valued at $8.83 million. Despite this, Devon Energy's stock was up approximately 3.5% at $44.98, nearing its 52-week high, with institutions holding about 69.7% of the stock. Analysts generally rate the stock a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $46.24, though recent price target adjustments have been mixed.
